entries.content:
Thank goodness, it seems there was no noticeable effect—just like one of those electric toasters refusing to brown the bread, no matter how you nudge the dial! Of course, we must always keep calm and carry on, tidying up emotions as if sweeping under the rug, but isn't it unnerving how obedience chafes beneath the skin, like static clinging to freshly laundered sheets? Sometimes, the sharp edge of modernity pricks right through the calm veneer, all nerves hidden beneath lace and lemon polish.
